summary: Bug fix VERIFIED - Asset intake to unassigned list flow working correctly. The bug 'gescannte Lager-ID erscheint nicht bei Nicht zugewiesen' (scanned warehouse ID does not appear in unassigned list) has been fixed. Frontend now correctly calls fetchUnassignedAssets() after asset creation, causing newly created assets to appear immediately in the unassigned list.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix correctly adds fetchUnassignedAssets() calls in submitIntake (line 539) and submitBulkIntake (line 437) functions
The useEffect at line 292-306 now fetches unassigned assets on initial load regardless of active tab, ensuring the counter badge is always accurate
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_asset_intake_unassigned.py - New test file for bug fix verification

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Bug fix verified via Playwright UI testing

seed_data_creation: Test assets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Navigation to test: Login -> Assets tab -> Rollout Management is auto-selected -> Wareneingang sub-tab. Create asset with serial number -> immediately appears in 'Nicht zugewiesen' tab with updated count badge.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: gescannte Lager-ID erscheint nicht bei Nicht zugewiesen - ganzer datensatz fehlt (scanned warehouse ID does not appear in unassigned list - whole record missing)
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend GoodsReceiptWorkflow.jsx was not calling fetchUnassignedAssets() after successful asset creation
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added fetchUnassignedAssets() calls in submitIntake and submitBulkIntake functions after successful creation
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend API tests (pytest) + Frontend UI tests (Playwright)

test_results.ui_test_result: Asset creation -> immediate appearance in unassigned list verified

api_endpoints_tested.result: Creates asset with auto-generated warehouse ID (e.g., TSRID-TAB-i7-0001)
Returns list of unassigned assets including newly created ones

ui_flows_verified: Login to admin portal with admin@tsrid.com/admin123
Navigate to Assets -> Rollout Management -> Wareneingang
Fill serial number in intake form
Click submit button to create asset
Verify unassigned count badge updates immediately
Switch to 'Nicht zugewiesen' tab to verify asset appears
